positive: A stylized minimalist illustration of a majestic Bengal tiger walking through overgrown jungle flora. The tiger should be highly detailed with strong, contrasting black stripes against rich orange and gold fur. The jungle backdrop should use graphic, stylized silhouettes of large leaves and vines, creating a sense of depth without clutter. The overall composition must be centralized, making the tiger the clear focal point. Use a limited, highly saturated color palette (deep emerald green, burnt orange, jungle teal, black, and gold). Flat design elements combined with vector art realism, high contrast, perfect symmetry, clean lines, perfect for apparel printing, sticker design, modern illustration, no gradients, 4k, octane render, high quality, visible detail
